TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tuku_Sayiun, title = Tuku_Sayiun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tuku_Sayiun} }

S.FORM: == Tuku Sayiun == ngangan ci Tuku Sayuen ku ngangan. u etul u tatama. u nalecuhan 1965.8.23 u minalu Ciwidiyan Sofeng Kilaykin u kakawaw u mikawaw i /cenfu. u wawa tulu ku wawa, u tatama amin. namakay cuwa a cudad
S.PHON: == tuku sajiun == ŋaŋan ʦi tuku sajuən ku ŋaŋan. u ətur~ɾ u tatama. u nar~ɾəʦuħan ****.*.** u minar~ɾu ʦiwidijan sofəŋ kir~ɾajkin u kakawaw u mikawaw i /ʦənfu. u wawa tur~ɾu ku wawa, u tatama amin. namakaj ʦuwa a ʦudad
S.FORM: == Tuku Sayiun == ngangan ci Tuku Sayuen ku ngangan. u etul u tatama. u nalecuhan 1965.8.23 u minalu Ciwidiyan Sofeng Kilaykin u kakawaw u mikawaw i /cenfu. u wawa tulu ku wawa, u tatama amin. namakay cuwa a cudad
S.PHON: == tuku sajiun == ŋaŋan ʦi tuku sajuən ku ŋaŋan. u ətur~ɾ u tatama. u nar~ɾəʦuħan ****.*.** u minar~ɾu ʦiwidijan sofəŋ kir~ɾajkin u kakawaw u mikawaw i /ʦənfu. u wawa tur~ɾu ku wawa, u tatama amin. namakaj ʦuwa a ʦudad
